g.title: High-Frequency Trading System Jitter and Tail Analysis

div.h3: Why Tail Latency Matters in HFT

ol.li: Adverse Selection: If your P99.9 is high, you are slow exactly when the market is most volatile.
Deterministic Execution: Algorithms assume a fixed "look-to-book" time.
Micro-Bursting: A single cache miss (100ns) at P99 cascades into a queueing disaster.

g.title: High-Frequency Trading System Jitter and Tail Analysis
